description_long: This is a long, straight sword with a dark, metallic blade that extends uniformly from the hilt to the tip. The blade appears double-edged and tapers slightly, giving it a sleek and formidable appearance. The crossguard is distinct, flaring outward with pointed quillons that provide hand protection and add to the weapon's menacing look. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped or textured for grip, and ends in a rounded pommel. The entire sword has a matte black or dark gray finish, suggesting a modern or fantasy-inspired design. There are no visible engravings or decorative elements, giving the sword a utilitarian and intimidating aesthetic.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a dark metallic blade, flared crossguard, and a cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel. The design is sleek, modern, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, prominent crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the sword with little detail visible.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark, possibly wrapped or textured, rounded pommel
